hero.text:
The board closed last night at an all-time high.

Since June 1 at $100 a unit: $10,000 → $15,706. Every pick timestamped before first pitch, every pick graded.

How it's built:

Max plays: 7-2, +37% ROI
Top picks: 33-19-1
Last 7 days alone: +27 units

Yesterday's card:

✅ The board's top-rated play — Diamondbacks ML
✅ A quiet 4-unit total in Mets–Braves
✅ Spain over Ronaldo at even money, posted here 15 minutes before kick

The first week is free. The chart doesn't need a salesman.

hero.hookRationale: Three impossible-sounding acts + a paradox in one sentence; the story is the moat — no other account has the timestamps to tell it.
hero.ladderRung: PROOF (1) + SOCIAL PROOF via Spain public-call receipt (2) + THE ASK
